text: two things stand out for mira's sitter. first, she has a mild egg allergy — eggs have given her hives before, so the sitter should know to avoid eggs in any food and to call you (and your pediatric office) right away if she reacts to anything. second, her blue elephant is her nap comfort object, so make sure it's within reach at naptime to help her settle. a good next step is to write both of these down somewhere visible — the egg note especially, along with your number and the pediatrician's — so the sitter isn't relying on memory in the moment.
